reviews.comment:
Lamentable trato del señor canoso que acomoda los autos, no sé si será el encargado pero lejos está de saber tratar a los clientes, prefiere ser piola en lugar de ayudar, errónea decisión teniendo en cuenta que uno vuelve a donde lo tratan bien y no vuelve a donde sucede lo contrario

(Translated by Google)
The gray-haired gentleman who parks the cars is appalling. I don't know if he's the manager, but he's far from knowing how to treat customers. He prefers to be sneaky rather than helpful, which is a mistake considering you go back to places where you're treated well, not where the opposite happens.
